species.citation: Ridl. , J. Straits Branch Roy. Asiat. Soc. 82 (1920) 169; Type: from Malaysia.
species.distribution: Malay Peninsula.
species.notes: Known from the Philippines from SMHI 154 Ridsdale (L) collected in Irawan, Palawan. Jayson Mansibang (pers. comm., 13-Jul-22): This specimen does not match the type (Ridley’s collector 371 (K)) and protologue of Garcinia murdochii. SMHI 154 Ridsdale has coarse venation (vs. fine venation) and axillary infructescence (vs. terminal infructescence).
